느헤미야 7:1.content: Now when the wall was built, and I had set up the doors, and the gatekeepers and the singers and the Levites were appointed,

느헤미야 7:2.content: I put my brother Hanani, and Hananiah the governor of the fortress, in charge of Jerusalem; for he was a faithful man, and feared God above many.

느헤미야 7:3.content: I said to them, “Don’t let the gates of Jerusalem be opened until the sun is hot; and while they stand guard, let them shut the doors, and you bar them: and appoint watches of the inhabitants of Jerusalem, everyone in his watch, with everyone near his house.”

느헤미야 7:4.content: Now the city was wide and large; but the people were few therein, and the houses were not built.

느헤미야 7:5.content: My God put into my heart to gather together the nobles, and the rulers, and the people, that they might be listed by genealogy. I found the book of the genealogy of those who came up at the first, and I found this written in it:

느헤미야 7:6.content: These are the children of the province who went up out of the captivity of those who had been carried away, whom Nebuchadnezzar the king of Babylon had carried away, and who returned to Jerusalem and to Judah, everyone to his city,

느헤미야 7:7.content: who came with Zerubbabel, Jeshua, Nehemiah, Azariah, Raamiah, Nahamani, Mordecai, Bilshan, Mispereth, Bigvai, Nehum, Baanah. The number of the men of the people of Israel:

느헤미야 7:8.content: The children of Parosh: two thousand one hundred seventy-two.

느헤미야 7:9.content: The children of Shephatiah: three hundred seventy-two.

느헤미야 7:10.content: The children of Arah: six hundred fifty-two.

느헤미야 7:11.content: The children of Pahathmoab, of the children of Jeshua and Joab: two thousand eight hundred eighteen.

느헤미야 7:12.content: The children of Elam: one thousand two hundred fifty-four.

느헤미야 7:13.content: The children of Zattu: eight hundred forty-five.

느헤미야 7:14.content: The children of Zaccai: seven hundred sixty.

느헤미야 7:15.content: The children of Binnui: six hundred forty-eight.

느헤미야 7:16.content: The children of Bebai: six hundred twenty-eight.

느헤미야 7:17.content: The children of Azgad: two thousand three hundred twenty-two.

느헤미야 7:18.content: The children of Adonikam: six hundred sixty-seven.

느헤미야 7:19.content: The children of Bigvai: two thousand sixty-seven.

느헤미야 7:20.content: The children of Adin: six hundred fifty-five.

느헤미야 7:21.content: The children of Ater: of Hezekiah, ninety-eight.

느헤미야 7:22.content: The children of Hashum: three hundred twenty-eight.

느헤미야 7:23.content: The children of Bezai: three hundred twenty-four.

느헤미야 7:24.content: The children of Hariph: one hundred twelve.

느헤미야 7:26.content: The men of Bethlehem and Netophah: one hundred eighty-eight.

느헤미야 7:27.content: The men of Anathoth: one hundred twenty-eight.

느헤미야 7:28.content: The men of Beth Azmaveth: forty-two.

느헤미야 7:29.content: The men of Kiriath Jearim, Chephirah, and Beeroth: seven hundred forty-three.

느헤미야 7:30.content: The men of Ramah and Geba: six hundred twenty-one.

느헤미야 7:31.content: The men of Michmas: one hundred twenty-two.

느헤미야 7:32.content: The men of Bethel and Ai: one hundred twenty-three.

느헤미야 7:33.content: The men of the other Nebo: fifty-two.

느헤미야 7:34.content: The children of the other Elam: one thousand two hundred fifty-four.

느헤미야 7:35.content: The children of Harim: three hundred twenty.

느헤미야 7:36.content: The children of Jericho: three hundred forty-five.

느헤미야 7:37.content: The children of Lod, Hadid, and Ono: seven hundred twenty-one.

느헤미야 7:38.content: The children of Senaah: three thousand nine hundred thirty.

느헤미야 7:39.content: The priests: The children of Jedaiah, of the house of Jeshua: nine hundred seventy-three.

느헤미야 7:40.content: The children of Immer: one thousand fifty-two.

느헤미야 7:41.content: The children of Pashhur: one thousand two hundred forty-seven.

느헤미야 7:42.content: The children of Harim: one thousand seventeen.

느헤미야 7:43.content: The Levites: the children of Jeshua, of Kadmiel, of the children of Hodevah: seventy-four.

느헤미야 7:44.content: The singers: the children of Asaph: one hundred forty-eight.

느헤미야 7:45.content: The gatekeepers: the children of Shallum, the children of Ater, the children of Talmon, the children of Akkub, the children of Hatita, the children of Shobai: one hundred thirty-eight.

느헤미야 7:46.content: The temple servants: the children of Ziha, the children of Hasupha, the children of Tabbaoth,

느헤미야 7:47.content: the children of Keros, the children of Sia, the children of Padon,

느헤미야 7:48.content: the children of Lebana, the children of Hagaba, the children of Salmai,

느헤미야 7:49.content: the children of Hanan, the children of Giddel, the children of Gahar,

느헤미야 7:50.content: the children of Reaiah, the children of Rezin, the children of Nekoda,

느헤미야 7:51.content: the children of Gazzam, the children of Uzza, the children of Paseah.

느헤미야 7:52.content: The children of Besai, the children of Meunim, the children of Nephushesim,

느헤미야 7:53.content: the children of Bakbuk, the children of Hakupha, the children of Harhur,

느헤미야 7:54.content: the children of Bazlith, the children of Mehida, the children of Harsha,

느헤미야 7:55.content: the children of Barkos, the children of Sisera, the children of Temah,

느헤미야 7:56.content: the children of Neziah, and the children of Hatipha.

느헤미야 7:57.content: The children of Solomon’s servants: the children of Sotai, the children of Sophereth, the children of Perida,

느헤미야 7:58.content: the children of Jaala, the children of Darkon, the children of Giddel,

느헤미야 7:59.content: the children of Shephatiah, the children of Hattil, the children of Pochereth Hazzebaim, and the children of Amon.

느헤미야 7:60.content: All the temple servants and the children of Solomon’s servants were three hundred ninety-two.

느헤미야 7:61.content: These were those who went up from Tel Melah, Tel Harsha, Cherub, Addon, and Immer; but they could not show their fathers’ houses, nor their offspring, whether they were of Israel:

느헤미야 7:62.content: The children of Delaiah, the children of Tobiah, the children of Nekoda: six hundred forty-two.

느헤미야 7:63.content: Of the priests: the children of Hobaiah, the children of Hakkoz, the children of Barzillai, who took a wife of the daughters of Barzillai the Gileadite, and was called after their name.

느헤미야 7:64.content: These searched for their genealogical records, but couldn’t find them. Therefore they were deemed disqualified and removed from the priesthood.

느헤미야 7:65.content: The governor told that they should not eat of the most holy things until a priest stood up to minister with Urim and Thummim.

느헤미야 7:66.content: The whole assembly together was forty-two thousand three hundred sixty,

느헤미야 7:67.content: in addition to their male servants and their female servants, of whom there were seven thousand three hundred thirty-seven. They had two hundred forty-five singing men and singing women.

느헤미야 7:68.content: Their horses were seven hundred thirty-six; their mules, two hundred forty-five;

느헤미야 7:69.content: their camels, four hundred thirty-five; their donkeys, six thousand seven hundred twenty.

느헤미야 7:70.content: Some from among the heads of fathers’ households gave to the work. The governor gave to the treasury one thousand darics of gold, fifty basins, and five hundred thirty priests’ garments.

느헤미야 7:71.content: Some of the heads of fathers’ households gave into the treasury of the work twenty thousand darics of gold, and two thousand two hundred minas of silver.

느헤미야 7:72.content: That which the rest of the people gave was twenty thousand darics of gold, plus two thousand minas of silver, and sixty-seven priests’ garments.

느헤미야 7:73.content: So the priests, the Levites, the gatekeepers, the singers, some of the people, the temple servants, and all Israel, lived in their cities. When the seventh month had come, the children of Israel were in their cities.
